Package space.sunqian.fs.object.schema

Interface MapType

All Superinterfaces:
Type
public interface MapType extends Type
Represents the type of map.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default String
    getTypeName()
     
    @Nonnull Type
    keyType()
    Returns the type of the key in the map.
    @Nonnull Type
    mapType()
    Returns the type of the map itself.
    static @Nonnull MapType
    of(@Nonnull Type mapType, @Nonnull Type keyType, @Nonnull Type valueType)
    Returns a new MapType instance.
    @Nonnull Class<?>
    rawType()
    Returns the raw type of the map itself.
    @Nonnull Type
    valueType()
    Returns the type of the value in the map.

  • Method Details

    • of

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull MapType of(@Nonnull @Nonnull Type mapType, @Nonnull @Nonnull Type keyType, @Nonnull @Nonnull Type valueType) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Returns a new MapType instance.
      Parameters:
      mapType - the type of the map itself
      keyType - the type of the key in the map
      valueType - the type of the value in the map
      Returns:
      a new MapType instance
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the given map type is not a Class or a ParameterizedType

      Returns the type of the map itself.
